overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a scenic mountain trail through pine forests, passing a grazing horse and approaching a distant stone castle. The clip features lush vegetation, colorful wildflowers, and dramatic mountain scenery.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside forest trail with mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside the mountain lake

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the forest floor
dense evergreen trees lining both sides of the trail
snow-capped mountain peaks in the background
calm mountain lake visible through the trees
colorful purple and yellow flowers along the path edges
medieval stone fortress visible in the distant mountains

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt trail through a lush pine forest with a mountain lake visible to the left. The path is lined with colorful wildflowers and tall evergreen trees, with snow-capped peaks and a distant stone fortress rising in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain village approach with grazing animals

events.description: a brown horse appears grazing on the left side of the path near wooden structures

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past the grazing horse and wooden hut

notable_agents.action: brown horse with saddle grazing peacefully beside the trail

entered.detail: small rustic wooden structure with thatched roof

segments.scene_description: The trail approaches a small mountain settlement where a brown horse grazes near a wooden hut. The lake falls behind as the path curves, and the stone castle becomes more centered in the view while the mountain range shifts to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic mountain overlook with castle view

events.description: character stops walking and pans camera to survey the valley and castle

agents.ego_description: stops on the path to look around at the mountain scenery and distant castle

segments.scene_description: Geralt pauses on the trail to take in the panoramic view of the mountain valley. The stone castle stands prominently against the sky while the character slowly pans to survey the surrounding peaks and forest, leaving the village structures behind.

events.description: path enters denser forest section with rocky walls closing in on both sides

agents.ego_description: resumes walking through the valley toward the distant castle

entered.detail: steep gray rock wall covered with patches of trees
jagged rocky peak becoming visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The trail continues deeper into the mountain valley where rocky cliffs rise on the right side. The stone castle remains in view ahead as Geralt walks through the increasingly enclosed forest path with dense vegetation on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding mountain trail that transitions from an open forest vista into a secluded valley path. It begins with Geralt walking through a lush pine forest lined with colorful wildflowers, with a mountain lake to the left and a distant stone fortress framed by snow-capped peaks. As the path curves, the lake recedes and the camera approaches a small settlement where a brown horse grazes near a wooden hut, bringing the castle more centrally into view. The scene then pauses for a panoramic survey of the surrounding peaks and forest before the camera turns back toward the trail. Finally, the environment shifts as the path leads deeper into the valley, passing rocky cliffs on the right and moving through increasingly dense vegetation toward the looming castle.
